batchStrategy.daily: Refresh station_daily and living_zone_od_daily once per batch. Dashboard reads the latest materialized facts only.
batchStrategy.fifteenMinute: Optional batch. Capture only top daily zones and only tracked commute hours to stay below OD API quota.
